About

About Kamiyama College

Opened in April 2023 in Kamiyama, Tokushima, this private KOSEN (College of Technology) is the first new KOSEN in Japan in 19 years. As an accredited 5-year higher-education institution for students after junior high school, it nurtures people who use the power of making to start something new.

Mission

Three areas at the core.

Technology

Technology

From software and AI to hardware — learning the principles that move society by building.

Design

Design

UI/UX, graphics, products. Cultivating a sensibility that gives meaning to technology.

Entrepreneurship

Entrepreneurship

From your own questions to a venture that reaches society — practiced daily with local partners.

Facts

School information

Name
Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology
Location
Kamiyama, Myozai, Tokushima, Japan
Founded
April 2023
Program
5-year integrated KOSEN program
Founder
Kamiyama Gakuen Educational Foundation
Official site
kamiyama.ac.jp →

For accurate and up-to-date information, please refer to the official site.
